roa.docketEntryComment: DA REQUEST ADD TO CALENDAR TO ISSUE BENCH WARRANT FILED AT INSISTENCE

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 05-02-22/TE:2 WEEKS/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE 04-04-22 AND TRIAL 04-15-22/DOP/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/INVOFF: SFPD OFFICER LOUIS HARGREAVES/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER THOMAS SMITH/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER AARON WILLIAMS/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER LOUIS HARGREAVES/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1) 3 PAGE DOCUMENT OF MINUTES & STAY AWAY ORDER FROM CASE #21003561/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 2A) PHOTO OF SCALE SHOWING 28,8 GRAMS/ /EXHMA: PEOPLE'S2B) PHOTO OF SCALE SHOWING 14,1 GRAMS/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 2C) PHOTO OF SCALE SHOWING 5,3 GRAMS/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 2D) PHOTO OF SCALE SHOWING 23,3 GRAMS/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 2E) PHOTO OF SCALE SHOWING 4,2 GRAMS/HTA1:1,3/871D:2/CTORD: COUNT 4 TO BE CERTIFIED/CTORD: DEFENDANT'S RELEASE CONDITIONS REMAIN THESAME/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED//X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENTIN DEPT 22 ON 03-01-22/

/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DEF: APPEARING VIA ZOOM/TN: BAYRON TURCIOS/X: SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER IS WAIVED FOR THESE PROCEEDINGS ONLY,//CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/LDPX: 02-28-22 (60)/TE: 1 HOUR/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:02-28-22/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARINGCONFERENCE/DOP/SAORD/SA2:AREA BOUNDED BY O'FARRELL & POLK, CYRIL MAGNINAND O'FARELL, MISSION &8TH ST , MISSION AND 10TH ST SF,CA/
/CAL:DA ADD TO CALENDAR TO ISSUE BW/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/NB/BWNUM:1ST/NIGHTSERV/VD:TRIAL AND LAST DAY/
/CAL: TRIAL, LD 05-02-22, TE 2 WEEKS/INTC/CONTD: PRE TRIAL CONFERENCE INS23/CONTD: TRIAL IN S22/DOP/
